fields.description: The id of the Mailbox.
fields.label: Mailbox ID

fields.description: User-visible name for the Mailbox, e.g., "Inbox".
fields.label: Name

fields.description: The Mailbox ID for the parent of this Mailbox.
fields.label: Parent ID

fields.description: Identifies Mailboxes that have a particular common purpose (e.g., the "inbox"), regardless of the name property (which may be localised).
fields.label: Role
fields.options:
inbox
important
sent
drafts
junk
archive
trash

fields.description: Defines the sort order of Mailboxes when presented in the client's UI.
fields.label: Sort Order

fields.description: The number of Emails in this Mailbox.
fields.label: Total Emails

fields.description: The number of Emails in this Mailbox that have neither the `$seen` keyword nor the `$draft` keyword.
fields.label: Unread Emails

fields.description: The number of Threads where at least one Email in the Thread is in this Mailbox.
fields.label: Total Threads

fields.description: An indication of the number of "unread" Threads in the Mailbox.
fields.label: Unread Threads

fields.description: The Mailbox link for the parent of this Mailbox.
fields.label: Parent

fields.description: Has the user indicated they wish to see this Mailbox in their client?
fields.label: Subscribed

fields.description: The user may use this Mailbox as part of a filter in an `Email/query` call, and the Mailbox may be included in the mailboxIds property of Email objects.
fields.label: May Read Items

fields.description: The user may add mail to this Mailbox (by either creating a new Email or moving an existing one).
fields.label: May Add Items

fields.description: The user may remove mail from this Mailbox (by either changing the Mailboxes of an Email or destroying the Email).
fields.label: May Remove Items

fields.description: The user may add or remove the `$seen` keyword to/from an Email.
fields.label: May Set Seen

fields.description: The user may add or remove any keyword other than `$seen` to/from an Email.
fields.label: May Set Keywords

fields.description: The user may create a Mailbox with this Mailbox as its parent.
fields.label: May Create Child

fields.description: The user may rename the Mailbox or make it a child of another Mailbox.
fields.label: May Rename

fields.description: The user may delete the Mailbox itself.
fields.label: May Delete

fields.description: Messages may be submitted directly to this Mailbox.
fields.label: May Submit

fields.description: The account this mailbox belongs to.
fields.label: Account
